goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0003 (M2 PR A — internal/statestore frozen interface, four-error taxonomy, paths.go helpers, LocalStore non-CAS ops) verified PASS and squash-merged via PR #154 → main commit 9b0a39c on 2026-05-29. impl/task-0003-m2-statestore-pra branch deleted. Verifier report at ai/reports/task-0003-verifier.md. Coverage on internal/statestore measured locally at 95.4 % (gate ≥95 %). Local quality gates (build/vet/race-test/cover/make test-state-redesign) all green. CI runs 26665146437 (Orun Plan) + 26665146435 (Harness dry-run guard) reviewed at log level: real orun plan invocation with 0 components × 3 envs → 0 jobs (legitimate empty-matrix M2-PR-A shape) and 30+ [guard] PASS assertions in dry-run-guard.sh.

StateStore interface is now FROZEN on main. Future divergence requires a spec-update proposal under ai/proposals/. Methods: Root, Read, Write, CreateIfAbsent, CompareAndSwap, List, Delete. Companion types: ObjectMeta{Path,Size,Revision,UpdatedAt}, ObjectInfo{Path,Size,UpdatedAt}, WriteOptions{} (empty in Phase 1), LocalConfig{Root, Clock} (Clock is an additive test-injection hook beyond state-store.md §5; non-breaking).

Path helpers in internal/statestore/paths.go cover every entry from state-store.md §2.1. Alphabet policy ([a-zA-Z0-9._-] per segment, no .. / leading slash / backslash / empty segment) is centralized in ValidateComponent / ValidatePath. M3 (internal/revision) has full path-helper coverage; no private helpers should be needed downstream.

Local-driver atomicity (state-store.md §3): Write uses temp-file + fsync + os.Rename with EXDEV cross-device fallback that copies into a fresh tempfile inside the destination directory and renames atomically. CreateIfAbsent uses O_EXCL → ErrExists on collision. Delete is no-op on absent paths and refuses non-empty directories with ErrInvalid (also refuses empty directories — slightly stricter than spec §3.4, called out as a Minor in verifier report; non-blocker). Orphan-tempfile sweep at construction removes .orun-tmp-* older than 1 hour using LocalConfig.Clock; sweep failures are best-effort.

CompareAndSwap and List are stubbed returning ErrInvalid-wrapped 'not implemented in PR A' so the interface compiles. Higher layers MUST NOT call them until PR B lands. No production callers wired in PR A (cmd/orun, internal/state, internal/runner, internal/runbundle untouched).

Next task = Task 0004 = M2 PR B: real CompareAndSwap + List + 100-goroutine atomicity/exclusivity property suite per test-plan.md §2/§3 (Write+Read atomicity, CreateIfAbsent exclusivity, concurrent CAS one-wins, rapid path-alphabet round-trip). Coverage gate stays ≥95 %; PR B should leave it ≥96 %. Still no production-caller wiring in PR B. PR C (typed refs/indexes marshallers) follows.

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml fails on composition-cache resolution (stack.yaml at ~/.orun/cache/compositions/c41fc08… has no spec.compositions). Reproduces from Task 0001 onward on main and PR branches. CI passes the same invocation; CI is authoritative.
